zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Hungerford於1445年出生在英國英格蘭薩默塞特法爾 格福德時，她的父親Sir Edmund Hungerford36歲，母親Margaret Burnell35歲。她於大約1465年與Sir Roger Winter III在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1519年12月24日在英國英格蘭戴文波德哈姆享年74歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Hungerford于1445年出生在英国英格兰薩默塞特法爾 格福德时，她的父亲Sir Edmund Hungerford36岁，母亲Margaret Burnell35岁。她于大约1465年与Sir Roger Winter III在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1519年12月24日在英国英格兰戴文波德哈姆享年74岁。

nameMeanings.name: Hungerford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Hungerford (Berkshire), from Old English hungor ‘hunger’, here probably denoting unproductive land, + ford. This surname has been established in Ireland since the 17th century.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Hungerford was born in 1445, in Farleigh Hungerford, Somerset, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir Edmund Hungerford, was 36 and her mother, Margaret Burnell, was 35. She married Sir Roger Winter III about 1465, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 4 daughters. She died on 24 December 1519, in Powderham, Devon, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 74.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Hungerford est née en 1445, à Farleigh Hungerford, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Edmund Hungerford, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Margaret Burnell, avait 35 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Roger Winter III environ 1465, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 24 décembre 1519, à Powderham, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 74 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Hungerfordが1445年にイギリスイギリスソメルセトファルレイグ ハンジャーフォードで生まれた時，父Sir Edmund Hungerfordは36歳，母Margaret Burnellは35歳であった。約1465年にイギリスイギリスでSir Roger Winter IIIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1519年12月24日にイギリスイギリスデボンポウデルハムで74歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Hungerford(이)가 1445년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 패를리 헌그르퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Edmund Hungerford(은)는 36세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Burnell(은)는 35세였다. 그녀는 대략 1465년 영국 잉글랜드에서 Sir Roger Winter III(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1519년 12월 24일 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 파우더함에서 74세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Hungerford родилась в 1445 г. в местности фарлиг хунгирфорд, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir Edmund Hungerford было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Burnell, 35. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Roger Winter III около 1465 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 4 дочери. Она умерла 24 декабря 1519 г. в местности поудирам, девон, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 74 лет.
